rag_rules: Move implementation-level guarantee references to implementation scope or remove them if invalid
Do not reference AADL property names like 'Period', 'Deadline', 'Priority' as AGREE variables
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions resolve to valid types and visible identifiers
Place AGREE contracts in appropriate AADL component type or implementation scopes
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree blocks
Guarantee statements are only allowed in component types
Numeric variables must be assigned numeric expressions
Helper functions must be declared or imported before use
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes
Do not use unresolved identifiers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about annex placement
Model Analyst Agent's structural extraction tasks
